emails.subject: Re: EWEB
emails.body: Re: EWEB Looks like nothing was ever done on this so I've contacted Tracy Ngo to move on a credit worksheet and then we can turn out a draft ASAP. Do I need to call Holli? Do you recall whether you and I had further discussions on this? Sara Christian Yoder 03/16/2000 12:40 PM
